Operational clarity, without the noise.

Pulse brings metrics, activity, and motion into one calm workspace. Explore the live sample app or ship your own data on top of the same kit.

Launch dashboard View analytics demo

Could not load the landing animation. For file://, keep landing-page-lottie-data.js merged into pulse-ui.js, or open over http://localhost so Landing Page.json can load.
